name: pi-glance
description: A polished input surface extension for pi, with a rounded multiline editor and inline model/context/status glance.
author: linys77

scripts.test:dev: npm run build:dev --silent && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-git.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-git-refresher.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-state-git.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-title.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-title-model.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-title-store.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-render-git.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-render-segments.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-workspace-label.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-themes.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-pane-render.js
scripts.test:git: npm run build:dev --silent && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-git.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-git-refresher.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-state-git.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-render-git.js
